news.t: Asian Currencies Consolidate Before Decision by Warsh-Led FOMC
Price caps, taking the stairs, and short-sleeved shirts: How countries are coping with the Iran war energy shock
Asian ETFs gain as U.S. stocks stumble
3 Country Funds That Could Benefit From Trade Wars

holdings.infoBox: THD is an equity ETF with a total of 87 individual holdings.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Thailand ETF (THD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Thailand IMI 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of the Thai equity market. THD was launched on Mar 26, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Asian Currencies Consolidate Before Decision by Warsh-Led FOMC
data.text: Asian currencies consolidated against the dollar before first decision by a FOMC led by Chairman Kevin Warsh later.

data.title: Price caps, taking the stairs, and short-sleeved shirts: How countries are coping with the Iran war energy shock
data.text: Countries around the world have scrambled to cope with the fallout of the energy shock from the Iran war. This comes as the Iran war stretches into its third week.

data.title: Thailand could be 'prime beneficiary' of rate cuts in developed markets: CIMB Group CEO
data.text: Novan Amirudin, CIMB's Group CEO, talks about the banking environment across Southeast Asia, and why he's positive about Thailand's position relative to global & developed markets.

data.title: Asian ETFs gain as U.S. stocks stumble
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to overseas assets outperformed Tuesday as U.S. stocks sold off in line with rising bond yields. The iShares MSCI Hong Kong ETF jumped 3.5%, while the SPDR Solactiv...

data.title: 3 Country Funds That Could Benefit From Trade Wars
data.text: Vietnam, Switzerland, and Thailand funds could offer safe haven and impressive returns if trade tensions escalate in coming months.
